name: Rice/Corn Patties
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked Amish Medium Brown Rice
1/2 cup Leftover cooked cereal (Yellow or White)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well.
2. Form into patties.
3. Fry lightly on both sides, or bake on an oiled cookie sheet for about 30 minutes at 350°F.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "Recipes for Special Dietary Needs" tri-fold Reprinted by permission of Arrowhead Mills, Inc. Electronic format courtesy of: Karen Mintzias
